purpose: Provide a no-form, public-safe result update format for break-zero checks and service lead follow-up.

evidence_gate.rung_hit: Use only when cash, usable credit, gift card, prize, refund, code, service payment, or other usable value is actually received and can be verified without exposing private data.
evidence_gate.no_hit: Use when the official/private check found no usable value.
evidence_gate.needs_user_private_check: Use when the user must privately check an official account or app before any status can change.
evidence_gate.drop_spend_required: Use when the route requires purchase, subscription, paid trial, deposit, gambling, gas, cloud spend, or unapproved cost.

next_routing.rung_hit: Do not publish private proof. Route to human verification for paid_or_usable_value decision.
next_routing.no_hit: Keep route as not_submitted or no_hit; continue next no-spend path.
next_routing.needs_user_private_check: Give the human the relevant private-check card and wait for public-safe summary.
next_routing.drop_spend_required: Exclude from break-zero unless user explicitly approves cost and ROI/stop-loss gate.

read_only_boundary: This is a static template. The website does not submit, store, upload, process payments, create accounts, or collect private data.
